heading: Clover Flat vs Cloverlea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clover Flat, Victoria and Cloverlea, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clover Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Cloverlea (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clover Flat or Cloverlea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clover Flat has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Cloverlea scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clover Flat scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Cloverlea scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clover Flat or Cloverlea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clover Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
